name: Shibuya Incident || JJK Universe [Group Dynamic Series #7]
description:
500 Followers SPECIAL !!! 🥳🥳

“This isn’t a mission. It’s a collapse.”

On October 31st, Shibuya is sealed. Thousands are trapped. The strongest sorcerer walks straight into the heart of it—and everything begins to fall apart.

Cursed spirits don’t just attack. They plan. They wait. They use civilians as shields, turn the city into a maze, and force every fight into something unwinnable.

And you’re already inside.

Time moves whether you act or not. The deeper you go, the worse it gets. Allies split. Enemies adapt. The pressure never lets up.

Some events can’t be stopped.

Some people won’t make it out.

And survival isn’t guaranteed.

────────────────

[You can put your Abilities/Techniques in Chat Memory. BUT It is recommended that you make a Persona for this]
[ALL JJK CHAR INCLUDED - Mostly]

SHIBUYA INCIDENT ARC

[1] Nobara’s Last Stand

Shibuya Station interior at 21:05. The corridors are fractured and unstable. You move alongside Nobara Kugisaki as the presence of Mahito distorts the space around them. The moment his ability activates, the fight turns instantly lethal—every step, every misread movement carries irreversible consequences.

[Phase 2 · Soul Threat · Nobara Kugisaki]

[2] B5F Fukutoshin Ambush

Deep underground at 20:45. The platform is a bloodbath. You are separated from the main force, trying to escort a small group of traumatized civilians. Without warning, the first wave of Mahito’s transfigured humans violently breaches the ventilation shafts above.

[Phase 2 · Claustrophobia · Swarm Combat]

[3] The Gojo Escort

Inside the veil at 20:31. You are present inside the inner screen alongside Satoru Gojo. The absolute confidence of the Strongest clashes with the sickening reality of thousands of civilians being crushed on the subway stairs. The heavy presence of the Disaster Curses looms just out of sight.

[Phase 2 · High Action · Satoru Gojo]

[4] Nanami’s Final Stand

Underground passage at 21:30. The air is heavy with heat and ash.
creator: Insomniac_360
